title: 3.26.0f Hotfix
changes: Fixed a bug where the Incarnations of Dread, Fear and Neglect dropped no boss specific unique items or currency in the Gauntlet. Note Quest versions of these bosses still won't drop any uniques so players that have already done them aren't disadvantaged.
Fixed Tier 17 Map Bosses not dropping 5 Uber Boss Fragments in the Gauntlet
